query:
-- Unique devices active today from active_sessions (guests + logged in)
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) AS total_unique_devices_today,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isGuest = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS guest_sessions_today,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isGuest = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS logged_in_sessions_today,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isGuest = 1 THEN deviceId END) AS unique_guest_devices_today
FROM active_sessions
WHERE DATE(lastActive) = CURDATE();

-- Unique fingerprints from visitor_tracking today
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT fingerprint) AS unique_visitors_today, COUNT(*) AS total_pageviews_today
FROM visitor_tracking
WHERE DATE(timestamp) = CURDATE();
